name: Vintage X
comment: Vintage X combines retro amber blinder effects (2000K) with vibrant background RGB LEDs, offering rich multi-color eye candy effects and smooth dimming. With advanced controllability, built-in lightshows, and versatile connectivity, it’s perfect for creative stage and event lighting setups.

capabilities.comment: Rnd Strobe Slow to Fast RGB
Rnd Strobe Slow to Fast Amber
